name: kb-extractor
description: Scans your codebase and generates a structured knowledge base for AI support chatbots — including what your product cannot do, so your bot never hallucinates on impossible requests.

plugins.name: kb-extractor-plugin
plugins.description: Scans your codebase and generates structured markdown KB files optimized for AI support chatbots. Extracts features, flows, constraints, and generates FAQ — including what is NOT possible, so your bot never says yes to impossible requests.
